script: F=/home/azureuser/rosi-responder.py; cp -f $F $F.bak-yoo-$(date +%s); echo '===== BEFORE ====='; grep -nE 'ROSI_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID|aadObjectId.*ROSI_AAD_ID|aadObjectId.*not in' $F | head -6; echo; sed -i 's|^ROSI_AAD_ID = \(".*"\)$|ROSI_AAD_ID = \1\nYOO_AAD_ID = "e0d48eb4-1eb3-4263-a72e-f6ad4ef32238"|' $F; sed -i 's|frm.get("aadObjectId", "") != ROSI_AAD_ID|frm.get("aadObjectId", "") not in (ROSI_AAD_ID, YOO_AAD_ID)|' $F; echo '===== AFTER ====='; grep -nE 'ROSI_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID|aadObjectId.*not in' $F | head -6; echo; echo '===== Restart =====' && sudo systemctl restart rosi-responder.service && systemctl is-active rosi-responder.service; echo; echo '===== Is Rosi published in Teams catalog? =====' && TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh 2>/dev/null); MID=37; M=/home/azureuser/.rosi-bot/manifest-id.txt; if [ -f $M ]; then MID=$(cat $M); fi; echo "  manifest.id from disk: $MID"; if [ -n "$TOKEN" ] && [ "${#MID}" -gt 10 ]; then curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?%24filter=externalId%20eq%20%27$MID%27" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq '{count: (.value|length), entries: [.value[] | {id, displayName, distributionMethod}]}' 2>&1; fi
